notes: Codex Beauty Labs is a pioneering US biotechnology and beauty company known for applying rigorous clinical evidence standards — including peer-reviewed published studies — to cosmetic ingredient and product validation, a rare practice in the industry. Their biotech active development focuses on microbiome support, skin barrier restoration, and sensitive skin applications with a strong commitment to clean, sustainable formulation. Codex Beauty Labs' emphasis on transparency and clinical proof makes them a highly credible SKIN-TWIN reference for evidence-based biotech ingredient recommendations.
